I really want to give a 5 but then I am just a fan boy giving a 5 because, well I am a fan boy. I was able to test a very early version of this product and sit in the office with the team for a week getting deep into their strategy and tech. It is a brilliant elegant solution that has the potential to offer so much power in terms of time savings in writing emails. I give a 4 because the product I used was very early on so I didn't get to see it in its full form. Can't wait to get access to the full production version!

The responses are super relevant and can be written in all languages. It’s a must-have app for companies or anyone who writes a lot of emails. Highly recommend! The team has done a great job. results.content:
customer support (1)

Report

 17 views

•11 reviews

One of the best CRMs I've used. intuitive, great support, easy to control leads/follow up, etc. The support is very responsive and always tries to help. Would be great to add aliases for emails and improve on automations/campaigns, right now they're not ideal, but I can see things are improving constantly.

#### What's great

responsive support (3)lead management (2)

#### What needs improvement

limited marketing features (2)email aliases (1)

Report

 15 views

•1 review

Great CRM for small to medium businesses! Currently, it lacks some marketing features which could be useful as well but it seems like they are constantly improving in this area as well by development and M&A.

#### What needs improvement [...] Based on 12 reviews

Review Pipedrive?

Reviewers mostly see Pipedrive as a simple, visual CRM that sales teams adopt quickly. They repeatedly praise the clean pipeline view, intuitive drag-and-drop stages, easy lead follow-up, and useful integrations, with one founder of PipedriveSheets highlighting its flexible API for Google Sheets sync. The main criticism is that it can feel limited as teams grow: reporting, forecasting, automation, collaboration controls, and some marketing features are seen as weaker or dependent on workarounds. Support feedback is mixed, with one longtime user reporting a very poor recent experience.

The UI, UX, and guidance of this product are all excellent! I can quickly generate a beautiful, usable, customizable landing page. So far, the only drawback is that the code cannot be downloaded. I can't integrate this landing page into my existing project or do further SEO. However, many low-code landing post generation tools on the market do not provide code download services. Maybe subscribers could provide such functionality?

results.content:

Remotely

Remotely

•1 review

Superb piece of kit, not only because it is free, but because the community buttresses it with any missing features that other software packages may have. In my 8 years of using it in the 3D art space, I have not yet encountered a reason to use any other 3D modelling software. Highly recommend you jump aboard!

Report

 20 views

SoWork

SoWork

•9 reviews

For being a free program it's fantastic. For the areas where it's lacking you can often find a mod to make up for it. It's constantly evolving and being improved. Can't wait until it's developed a little bit more to be real competition for Autodesk.

Best opensource tool I have ever seen. In short: you can do a complete 3D movie. 3D Animation. You can also use it for 3D printing etc. The only downside: you need to know what you want to do & you need time to learn in order to get into a creative flow. But a lot of helpful tutorials can be found.

Blender is a great modeling program—I use it all the time! It’s incredibly versatile. However, I wish the developers would focus more on modeling rather than texturing, sculpting, and geometry nodes, as there are more specialized programs for those tasks.

results.title: Rize Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
Amazing app that does everything automatically! I'm finally getting a true insight into my working and task switching habits and I especially love being able to see which times of day I focus best so I can start to build my work priorities around those. It takes a little while to update when you change activity categories etc. so it's hard to see things reflected instantly (leave it for a while or close it and reopen) but it does work. And I'd like slightly more granular control over some of the categorising (maybe it's there and I just need to learn the product better). There have also been a few times when it's struggled to open. But I'd tried RescueTime and it had worked great for me a few years ago but they've removed some key features, like tracking tasks by hours so you can see when [...] #### What's great

built-in music (4)focus time feature (3)

Best Productivity app ever! And I say this with so much gratitude to the team at Rize for building a fantastic tool which helps entrepreneurs, creators, and everyone else understand exactly where their time is spent. It's been a game changer in my business life. I hope more people take advantage of this great tool to improve their time management and overall work life.

It's one of the best apps if you like your day to be productive. One feature I like most is Start focus time - which helps me set background music. This one feature alone has made my day very effective. If you have dreams about achieving something in life, this must-have app.
